channel.title: GitHub SCSS Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of SCSS in GitHub

item.title: jekyll/minima
item.description: Minima is a one-size-fits-all Jekyll theme for writers.

item.title: pages-themes/minimal
item.description: Minimal is a Jekyll theme for GitHub Pages

item.title: just-the-docs/just-the-docs
item.description: A modern, high customizable, responsive Jekyll theme for documentation with built-in search.

item.title: pages-themes/hacker
item.description: Hacker is a Jekyll theme for GitHub Pages

item.title: IanLunn/Hover
item.description: A collection of CSS3 powered hover effects to be applied to links, buttons, logos, SVG, featured images and so on. Easily apply to your own elements, modify or just use for inspiration. Available in CSS, Sass, and LESS.

item.title: cobiwave/simplefolio
item.description: ⚡️ A minimal portfolio template for Developers

item.title: vinceliuice/WhiteSur-gtk-theme
item.description: MacOS like theme for all gtk based desktops

item.title: daviddarnes/alembic
item.description: ⚗️ A Jekyll boilerplate theme designed to be a starting point for any Jekyll website

item.title: zerostaticthemes/jekyll-serif-theme
item.description: Serif is a multi page business theme for Jekyll.

item.title: vinceliuice/Orchis-theme
item.description: Orchis is a [Material Design](https://material.io) theme for GNOME/GTK based desktop environments.

item.title: patternfly/patternfly
item.description: This repo contains core (HTML/CSS) implementation for PatternFly. Issues related to CSS/HTML and layout should be filed here.

item.title: RyanFitzgerald/devportfolio
item.description: A lightweight, customizable single-page personal portfolio website template built with JavaScript and Sass
